sentences.target: Tu es courageux de lui parler.

translations.fr: Tu es courageux de lui parler.
translations.en: You're brave to talk to him.
translations.es: Eres valiente por hablar con él.
translations.de: Du bist mutig, mit ihm zu reden.
translations.ru: Ты смелый, что решился поговорить с ним.
translations.pt: Você é corajoso por falar com ele.
translations.vi: Bạn dũng cảm khi nói chuyện với anh ấy.
translations.nl: Je bent moedig dat je met hem praat.
translations.uk: Ти сміливий, що говориш із ним.
translations.hi: उससे बात करने के लिए तुम बहादुर हो.
translations.pl: Jesteś odważny, że z nim rozmawiasz.
translations.nb: Du er modig som snakker med ham.
translations.sv: Du är modig som pratar med honom.
translations.ro: Ești curajos că vorbești cu el.
translations.cs: Jsi odvážný, že s ním mluvíš.
translations.da: Du er modig, når du taler med ham.
translations.ja: 彼に話しかけるなんて勇気があるね。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; refers to the addressee and triggers 2SG agreement on the copula.
Copular auxiliary, present 2nd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular agreeing with the subject; expresses a quality of the subject.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement after an evaluative adjective (courageux de + infinitif).
3rd person singular indirect object clitic; complements the infinitive ‘parler’ (parler à quelqu’un).
Infinitive verb serving as the complement introduced by ‘de’; takes ‘lui’ as indirect object.

translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi cảm thấy dũng cảm.
translations.hi: आज मैं खुद को बहादुर महसूस कर रही हूँ।
translations.nb: I dag føler jeg meg modig.
translations.da: I dag føler jeg mig modig.
translations.ja: 今日は勇気がある気がする。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; part of the pronominal verb construction ‘se sentir’.
Main verb, present 1st person singular; in pronominal use (‘se sentir’) it takes a predicate complement.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; agrees with the (female) subject, expressing a state.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time of the state.

sentences.target: Vous êtes courageux face à ça.

translations.fr: Vous êtes courageux face à ça.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们面对这件事很勇敢。
translations.yue: 你哋面對呢件事好勇敢。
translations.ru: Вы смелые, что справляетесь с этим.
translations.pt: Vocês são corajosos por lidar com isso.
translations.vi: Các bạn dũng cảm khi đối mặt với việc này.
translations.ar: أنتم شجعان في التعامل مع هذا.
translations.nl: Jullie zijn moedig dat jullie hiermee omgaan.
translations.uk: Ви сміливі, що справляєтеся з цим.
translations.hi: तुम लोग इससे निपटने में बहादुर हो.
translations.pl: Jesteście odważni, że sobie z tym radzicie.
translations.nb: Dere er modige som håndterer dette.
translations.sv: Ni är modiga som hanterar detta.
translations.ro: Sunteți curajoși că vă descurcați cu asta.
translations.cs: Jste odvážní, že se s tím vypοřádáváτε.
translations.da: I er modige, når I håndterer dette.
translations.ja: これに対処するなんてあなたたちは勇敢だ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person (plural or formal singular).
Copular auxiliary, present 2nd person plural/formal singular; links the subject to the predicate.
Predicate adjective; masculine form (singular or plural) agreeing with ‘vous’; expresses a quality.
Noun used in the fixed expression ‘face à’, forming a multiword preposition meaning ‘in the face of/facing’.
Preposition completing the multiword preposition ‘face à’ and introducing its object.
Demonstrative pronoun; object of the prepositional phrase ‘face à’, referring to a contextually given entity.

sentences.target: Elles sont courageuses même en tremblant.

translations.fr: Elles sont courageuses même en tremblant.
translations.es: Ellas son valientes incluso cuando tiemblan.
translations.de: Sie sind mutig, selbst wenn sie zittern.
translations.zh-Hans: 她们即使发抖也很勇敢。
translations.yue: 佢哋即使發抖都好勇敢。
translations.pt: Elas são corajosas mesmo quando tremem.
translations.vi: Họ vẫn dũng cảm dù đang run.
translations.nl: Ze zijn moedig, zelfs wanneer ze beven.
translations.hi: वे काँपते हुए भी बहादुर हैं.
translations.pl: Są odważne, nawet gdy się trzęsą.
translations.el: Είναι θαρραλέες ακόμη κι όταν τρέμουν.
translations.nb: De er modige selv om de skjelver.
translations.sv: De är modiga även när de skakar.
translations.ro: Sunt curajoase chiar și când tremură.
translations.cs: Jsou odvážné, i když se třесou.
translations.da: De er modige, selv når de ryster.
translations.fi: He ovat rohkeita, vaikka he vapisevat.
translations.ja: 彼女たちは震えていても勇敢だ。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural feminine.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, feminine plural; agrees with ‘elles’, expressing a quality.
Adverb meaning ‘even’; intensifies the concessive nuance of the following gerund phrase.
Preposition used with a present participle to form the gerund (‘en’ + gérondif), marking concomitance (‘while’).
Present participle functioning as a gerund with ‘en’; modifies the main clause by expressing concurrent action.

jp: Tu es courageux de lui parler.
Vous êtes courageux face à ça.
Elles sont courageuses même en tremblant.
fr: Tu es courageux de lui parler.
Vous êtes courageux face à ça.
Elles sont courageuses même en tremblant.
en: You're brave to talk to him.
